Post Detail
Notice Important

System maintenance schedule for Q2 2026

A
Admin
2026-03-28 09:15 342

The following maintenance windows are scheduled for Q2 2026. Please ensure all critical workloads are backed up prior to each window.

April 12 (02:00-04:00 KST) - Database cluster failover testing
May 3 (01:00-03:00 KST) - Network infrastructure upgrade
June 21 (02:00-05:00 KST) - Full system security audit and patch cycle

Contact the infrastructure team for questions or scheduling conflicts.
